summary: Plan-only assessment: #92892 is the useful canonical repair candidate for the Gemini CLI image-capability fix, but it is not merge-ready because mergeability is unknown, the Real behavior proof check is failing, comments/review-bot preflight is not hydrated, and no Codex /review proof is present. Recommend a bounded contributor-branch repair path that preserves YonganZhang's credit.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR should be repaired on its editable branch before any merge recommendation; failing proof and missing merge preflight block merge_candidate.
Build an executable repair artifact for Clownfish scripts; do not merge until validation and review gates are complete.
Plan the guarded fix-PR path as a fallback only after branch repair attempts; no direct worker mutation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #92892 so Gemini CLI image-capable chat models are accepted when catalog metadata is stale or missing image-input metadata, while retaining fail-closed behavior for non-chat Gemini models such as embeddings. The repair must resolve the failing Real behavior proof check and complete merge preflight before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): allow Gemini CLI image-capable models
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair and finalize the focused Gemini CLI image-capability fix from #92892.
- Treat google-gemini-cli Gemini flash/pro chat models as image-capable when catalog metadata is stale or missing image input.
- Preserve fail-closed behavior for non-chat Gemini models such as embeddings.

## Credit
This carries forward the work from YonganZhang in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92892.

## Validation
- pnpm format:check src/gateway/session-utils.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
- pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
- Codex /review clean before merge
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for YonganZhang as the author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92892.
If a replacement PR is required, include explicit attribution to YonganZhang and link the source PR in the PR body.
